arts.ttl: How to watch Tottenham vs Man Utd - TV channel, live stream details, kick off time - football.london
arts.sum: Tottenham and Manchester United find themselves at the bottom end of the Premier League table as they face each other this afternoon. Yes, the match will be broadcast live on the Sky Sports Main Event and Premier League channels with coverage starting at 4pm.

arts.ttl: Premier League live: Tottenham host Man United
Vicario and Maddison return for Spurs against Man United
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been boosted by the return of Gugliemo Vicario and James Maddison for this afternoon’s clash with Manchester United. Ange Postecoglou welcomes back the pair to his depleted squad, as Spurs look to bounce back from recent results. Spurs have exited both domestic cup competitions in recent games and currently sit 15th in […] The post Vicario and Maddison return for Spurs against Man United first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Tottenham v Manchester United: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 4.30pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | Top scorers | And the latest tables Spurs are boosted by the return from injury of Guglielmo Vicario and James Maddison, with Ben Davies also coming into the side. Archie Gray, Mikey Moore and Antonin Kinsky drop to the bench. Brennan Johnson and Wilson Odobert are also among the subs. Man Utd are down to the bare bones, with Amad Diallo, Kobbie Mainoo, Manuel Ugarte, Toby Collyer and Christian Eriksen all unavailable. Casemiro comes into the team, while the exciting 17-year-old Chido Obi – who scored a hat-trick against Chelsea in the FA Youth Cup this week – is in United’s matchday squad for the first time. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Casemiro returns! Man United name team to face Tottenham
arts.sum: Casemiro has been recalled to the Manchester United team to face Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League this afternoon. The Brazil international has not made a league appearance for the Red Devils in 2025, but returns amid several absentees in Ruben Amorim’s squad. 🚨 Presenting today’s United XI 👇#MUFC || #TOTMUN — Manchester United (@ManUtd) […] The post Casemiro returns!
